# Documentation build dependencies for reward-lens.
# Install into a fresh virtualenv:  pip install -r docs/requirements-docs.txt
# You do NOT need torch/transformers to build the docs — the API reference is
# generated by griffe via static analysis of src/.

mkdocs-material>=9.5.0
mkdocstrings[python]>=0.26.0
mkdocs-jupyter>=0.25.0
pymdown-extensions>=10.9
black>=24.0            # lets mkdocstrings format API signatures cleanly

# Optional. Enable if you cite papers with a .bib file via mkdocs-bibtex.
# mkdocs-bibtex>=2.16.0

# Optional. Versioned docs (mike) and social cards need extra system deps
# (cairo, etc.); leave them off until you actually want them.
# mike>=2.1.0
